name: Peanut Butter Logs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter and softened butter; stir in the powdered sugar thoroughly.
2. Add the cereal and mix well, crushing the cereal slightly.
3. Shape the mixture into three logs measuring 7 x 1 1/4 inches.
4. Cover the logs with chopped peanuts.
5. Wrap each log tightly in plastic wrap or waxed paper.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Carefully slice the logs to about 1/2 inch thick.
